Affordable, professional, collaborative graphic design for small businesses across Simcoe County, Muskoka, GTA and beyond. Our ION Print & Promo design team is here for you.
Good design makes a big difference!

At ION Print & Promo, our in-house designers help local businesses look professional—without the big-agency price tag. From logos to signage and marketing materials, we'll make your brand consistent, polished, and built to impress.

From your storefront to your website, everything your customers see should look sharp and feel like you. We help businesses and non-profits look good—both in print and online.

Whether it's your business cards, signs, menus, vehicle graphics, website updates, or anything else, our designers work closely with you to get it right, every time.
